为任何产品生成高级感宣传动画提示词 Skill！

他会询问你的产品信息和让你提供截图帮你生成Seedance 2.0 产品宣传动画提示词。

如果你装了即梦 CLI 还会自动帮你生成视频 https://t.co/rEtQIYDYgs

Gemini 真是做设计的一把好手，尤其是用 SVG 画 logo

只要给一些适当的引导就可以画的很好

给 Codepilot  的新 logo SVG 的部分也是他完成的，我自己在基础上精修 https://t.co/FXImDddv81

昨天在测试一款 Markdown 编辑器，结果发现我的 claude code 5小时额度很快没了，一开始我没联系起来，还在想是不是我自己用多了，然后刚才用 claude --resume 发现了一大坨 claude code cli 的请求，它在尝试用 claude code 分析我目录下所有的 markdown 文档！

我不觉得它这是恶意，但是 claude https://t.co/G6Lhyj2vJh
澄清一下，这个选项默认确实是关闭的，所以我不认为作者是恶意启用这个功能，可能只是bug或者我自己修改配置导致的 https://t.co/gs5sInuO7X

At this point, I assume that every internal memo at an AI lab is just written for public release.

The labs are certainly capable of keeping secrets that don’t leak, so they must realize that all-hands memos or announcements just go right to The Information or Wired or whatever.

🚨Somebody leaked a system prompt that Zuckerberg was using for the AI clone of himself.

I made the prompt customizable, so you can turn it into any CEO (or yourself) of your preference, and have them available on demand 24/7.

----------------------------
CEO CLONE ON DEMAND https://t.co/9t7Kg3qKLj

> Why five layers instead of free-form biography: The Zuckerberg reference prompt works because each section does a different job - Identity orients, Personality governs response style, History provides conversational depth, Of Note creates texture, and Rules create guardrails.

Meta is making Zuckerberg's AI clone for the employees to talk to. 

If the AI hallucinates, and employee listens to its orders, I guess it's safe to say that the said employee is going to lose their job. 

This all, of course, will backfire spectacularly. Just a matter of time. https://t.co/zk9tK9jhtg
